events.title: Awakened Dreamers: Carnival Spirit at The Jungle Club
events.description: Awakened Dreamers returns for another edition of their signature ecstatic dance celebration — this time with a Carnival Spirit theme at The Jungle Club Ubud in the Sayan valley. Expect the usual Awakened Dreamers alchemy: conscious dance floor, live DJ sets, costume creativity, and a warm community of movers. The 2026 season has migrated from their previous DTT home to the Jungle Club jungle setting, bringing fresh energy to a beloved format. No alcohol on the dance floor. All bodies, all levels.
events.short_description: Ecstatic dance celebration with a Carnival Spirit theme, set in the Jungle Club Ubud — the 2026 home of Awakened Dreamers.

events.title: Beauty Way with Liquid Bloom
events.description: Amani Friend (Liquid Bloom) offers Beauty Way — a multi-modal ceremony weaving cacao, sound journey, and guided ceremonial practice into a single immersive arc. Liquid Bloom's production is renowned for its layered, intentional soundscapes that support deep somatic and emotional processing. This edition is held at Yoga Barn, grounding the experience in Ubud's most trusted ceremonial container. Beauty Way is designed for those seeking beauty as a portal: beauty in sound, beauty in presence, beauty in collective healing.
events.short_description: Cacao ceremony and sound journey with Amani Friend (Liquid Bloom) at Yoga Barn — beauty as a portal to deep presence.
